petDescriptions.wukong: A tiny mythic Monkey King pet inspired by the public-domain Journey to the West figure.

home.title: PawBae Home

status.working: Keeping you company while you code

empty.title: Invite a friend to meet {pet}
empty.body: Friends beta opens after account connection.

friends.title: Friends
friends.subtitle: Visits and mutual friends
friends.betaNote: Handle search and invite links open with account support.
friends.emptyBody: Connect an account when Friends beta becomes available.

disabled.hosting: Your home is already hosting a visitor.
disabled.away-elsewhere: Your pet is visiting someone else.
disabled.friend-busy: This friend's pet is busy visiting.
disabled.already-requested: Respond to the visit request above.
disabled.unavailable: This action is not connected yet.

album.title: Album
album.privacy: Shared memories stay between you, your friend, and your pets. They're never published or shared automatically.
album.emptyBody: After your first mutual-friend visit, memories you make together will appear here.

plaza.title: Plaza
plaza.body: We're still designing a safe, thoughtful way to discover other pet homes.

visit.cardTitleUnknownPet: A pet from {owner} wants to visit

home.privacy: Shared memories stay between the two of you.

mini.ccStartTracking: Send a message in Claude Code to start tracking
mini.startTracking: Send a message in {{targets}} to start tracking

settings.noConnections: No connections. Click "Add" to connect an OpenClaw instance.
settings.howToConnect: How to connect to a remote server?
settings.prerequisitesDesc: The remote server must have OpenClaw installed and Gateway running.
settings.step1: 1. Generate a local SSH key (if you don't have one)
settings.step2: 2. Copy the public key to the remote server
settings.step4: 4. Enter the username and server address, then click "Test"
settings.enableClaudeCodeDesc: Monitor local Claude Code sessions via Hooks
settings.enableCodexDesc: Monitor local Codex sessions via Hooks
settings.mascotPositionDesc: Which side of the notch the mascot is on
settings.mascotScaleDesc: Adjust the mascot size using a multiplier
settings.panelMaxHeightDesc: Maximum height of the expanded panel
settings.largeMascotScaleDesc: Scale multiplier for large mascot mode
settings.stageToggleDesc: A borderless mirror window for streaming — in OBS, add a Window Capture of "PawBae Stage", then a Chroma Key filter.
settings.stageHint: Match your Chroma Key filter's color — switch if it clashes with your pet.
settings.completionSoundDesc: Sound played when a task completes
settings.ccSoundDesc: Play sound when Claude Code finishes a task
settings.codexSoundDesc: Play sound when Codex finishes a task
settings.enableCursorDesc: Monitor local Cursor agent sessions via Hooks
settings.cursorSoundDesc: Play sound when Cursor finishes a task
settings.waitingSoundDesc: Play sound when Claude Code awaits user confirmation
settings.autoExpandOnTaskDesc: Automatically expand panel when a task completes or needs input
settings.codingModeDesc: Multi-agent monitoring, token stats & task alerts
settings.petModeDesc: Rich animations, nurture system & interactive play
settings.hoverDelayDesc: Delay before expanding panel on hover
settings.autoCloseCompletionDesc: Automatically close the completion popup after 5 seconds
settings.petSfxDesc: Play character sound effects during interactions
settings.strollModeDesc: Let the pet roam the screen — walk around, get dragged and thrown
settings.petIdleIntervalDesc: How often the mascot triggers a random action while idle
settings.inputReactionsDesc: Let the pet react to your typing and clicks. Only event counts are sensed — never which keys or what you type — and nothing leaves your device.
settings.inputKeyboardOff: Keyboard sensing is unavailable — grant Accessibility access in System Settings.
settings.voiceInteractionDesc: The pet hears and reacts to what you say. Audio is only recorded while you hold the shortcut, recognized on-device, and never leaves your machine.
settings.voiceShortcutHint: Shortcut: Control + Shift + V to start/stop. Chinese recognition is supported first.
settings.musicReactionDesc: When you play music (Spotify, Apple Music, NetEase, QQ Music…), the pet vibes along and says a line. Detection uses the system's now-playing info only — never the audio itself.
settings.telemetryDesc: Share anonymous feature counts (app starts, agent tasks, meals) to help improve PawBae. Never includes prompts, file paths, or anything personal. Off by default.

account.title: Account
account.unconfiguredDesc: This build has no platform credentials; sign-in is unavailable
account.signInDesc: Sign in to unlock friends & visiting (closed beta)
account.connectDesc: Share your pet's 5-state projection with friends; nothing leaves this machine when off

onboarding.chooseModeSubtitle: You can switch between modes at any time in Settings.
onboarding.codingModeLongDesc: Monitor your AI agents. Hover the mascot to see agent status, sessions, and activity.
onboarding.petModeLongDesc: Raise your desktop pet! Feed, play, and build affection with rich animations.
onboarding.telemetryOptIn: Share anonymous usage stats to help improve PawBae

welcome.title: Meet the gentler side of AI agents
welcome.body: Your pet reacts when Claude Code, Codex, or Cursor works.
welcome.telemetry: Share anonymous feature counts to help improve PawBae. Never includes prompts, file paths, or personal content.

github.title: Connect your identity—not your code
github.body: GitHub will power friends and shared memories without reading your repositories.
github.unavailable: GitHub sign-in opens with the Friends beta.

agents.title: Which agent should your pet listen to?
agents.body: Choose one or more. PawBae installs a small local Hook for each connection.

adopt.title: Choose your first desktop companion
adopt.body: Different personalities, one gentle way to stay close to your agents.
adopt.spriteNotice: Your choice will be saved; animated desktop forms arrive with the Stage update.

errors.complete: Couldn’t save your setup. Try again.

achDesc.agent_first: An agent completed its first task by your side.
achDesc.focus_30: 30 focus blocks — five hours in the zone.
achDesc.feed_first: Fed your pet for the first time.

updateModal.title: Update Available
updateModal.availableSubtitle: A new version of PawBae is ready to install.
updateModal.pleaseDontClose: Please do not close the application
updateModal.completeDesc: Restart the application to apply changes.

reply.unknown: Hmm? I didn't quite catch that~

board.title: Today's Tasks

task.agent: Finish a task with your agent

board.streakHint: Check-in streak: any one task keeps it going
board.shieldHint: Streak shields: a missed day spends one instead of breaking the streak (earn one every 7 days, max 2)

lore.species: Cloud-eared creature · from the cloud where the agents work
lore.short: Born in the cloud where the agents work. Her cloud ears hear every task finish; the scent of done work is her dinner. Clouds never scold anyone.
lore.tagline: She slid down from the cloud where the agents work — and landed on your desktop.

adventure.shelfHint: When a task runs long she packs her little bag and heads back up to the cloud — she never comes home empty-pawed.

cloud_fluff.name: A pinch of cloud fluff
cloud_fluff.flavor: Great for napping on. Slightly sneezy.

ding_echo.name: An echo of a ding
ding_echo.flavor: Carried home in her ear; shake it for half a ring.

rounded_pebble.name: A cloud-polished pebble
rounded_pebble.flavor: Rolled around up there for years; round beyond all argument.

steam_candy.name: A steam gumdrop
steam_candy.flavor: Condensed from the scent of finished work; filling to smell, impossible to eat.

mist_ribbon.name: A ribbon of mist
mist_ribbon.flavor: Refuses to hold a knot. Floats beautifully though.

star_crumbs.name: Star crumbs
star_crumbs.flavor: Swept up by the cloud folk, who insisted they were worthless. She took a handful anyway.

rain_seed.name: A rain seed
rain_seed.flavor: Won't actually grow rain in a flowerpot. She wants to try anyway.

stray_feather.name: Somebody's feather
stray_feather.flavor: There are no birds on the cloud, which makes this one highly discussable.

tiny_ladder.name: A miniature cloud ladder
tiny_ladder.flavor: Three rungs: enough for something very small to climb something very low.

washed_note.name: An old note
washed_note.flavor: The rain washed the words away. She insists they were kind ones.

wind_knot.name: A knot tied by the wind
wind_knot.flavor: Undo it and it's gone. So it must never be undone.

warm_button.name: A sun-warmed button
warm_button.flavor: Owner unknown. Stays warm in the paw regardless.

rain_smell_jar.name: The smell of before-the-rain
rain_smell_jar.flavor: Bottled. One sniff, ever — save it for a hard day.

moon_shaving.name: A moon shaving
moon_shaving.flavor: The part the moon loses each month. Cost her three dings.

dud_thunder.name: A little thunder that never went off
dud_thunder.flavor: A dud. Hums softly when hugged, like a snore.

cloud_bell.name: A cloud bell
cloud_bell.flavor: Only rings when nobody's listening — so no one can prove it doesn't.

fog_marble.name: A fog-core marble
fog_marble.flavor: A wisp of fog curled inside; spins on its own before the weather turns.

sky_postcard.name: A postcard the sky mailed to itself
sky_postcard.flavor: Sender and recipient: both "the sky." The stamp is a scrap of sunset.

dream_cotton.name: Dream cotton
dream_cotton.flavor: Gently picked from a sleeping cloud. One extra dream per pillow, allegedly.

ding_whistle.name: A whistle that dings
ding_whistle.flavor: Plays dings instead of whistles. A favorite among the cloud's workaholics.

whole_kiwi.name: An entire kiwi
whole_kiwi.flavor: The cloud folk agree: the longest-sleeping, best-fuzzed cloud of all. Nobody dared touch it on the way home.

first_ding.name: The world's first ding
first_ding.flavor: Sealed in a small amber lamp. Every ding since is one of its children.

cloud_key.name: The key to the cloud
cloud_key.flavor: Opens nothing — clouds have no doors. But carry it, and anywhere counts as home.

bottled_aurora.name: Bottled aurora
bottled_aurora.flavor: A lock left behind when the aurora passed the cloud's roof. Changes color by itself at night.

skin.title: Skin Workshop
skin.importOk: Skin imported — she's wearing it now ✓

issue.notObject: pet.json is not a JSON object
issue.atlasField: Atlas field {field} must be a positive integer
issue.atlasWiderThanImage: Atlas needs {need}px of width but the image has {have}px
issue.atlasTallerThanImage: Atlas needs {need}px of height but the image has {have}px
issue.atlasRemainder: Image is not evenly divided along {axis} ({used}px used of {actual}px)
issue.inheritedRowsExceedAtlas: No animations declared, so the standard 9-row × 8-column layout applies — but the atlas is only {rows} rows × {cols} columns
issue.missingIdle: animations must include an idle row
issue.rowOutOfRange: {name}: row {row} is outside the atlas ({rows} rows)
issue.badFrames: {name}: frames must be a positive integer (got {frames})
issue.badOffsetCol: {name}: offsetCol must be a non-negative integer (got {offsetCol})
issue.framesOverflow: {name}: needs {need} columns but the atlas has {cols}
issue.missingStandardRows: Missing standard rows: {rows} (they fall back gracefully)
issue.hugeImage: Very large image ({w}×{h}) — may affect performance
issue.unreadable: Could not read the imported skin

egg.title: Cloud Egg
egg.buyHint: A calling card from a neighbor you haven't met — warm it with finished work and it will hatch.
egg.allMet: Every cloud neighbor has already moved in. New faces are on their way!
egg.warmthHint: Each finished agent task and each meal adds one wisp of warm steam.
egg.hatchedSub: A new neighbor moved in! Say hi in the gallery.
egg.foundBubble: She brought a cloud egg home!

dex.lockedHint: You haven't met this neighbor yet — hatch a cloud egg to invite them.

diary.title: Diary
diary.empty: The diary is still empty — let's get something done together!

opener.v2: Another day side by side: we

seg.coins: {n, plural, one {tucked away # coin} other {tucked away # coins}}

m.adopted: The day we first met. Hi, it's me!
m.perfectDay: A perfect day — every little task done.
m.souvenir: I brought home a real treasure: {name}.
m.eggFound: Found a cloud egg on my adventure!
m.dexCompleted: We've now met every neighbor on the cloud.

greet.morning: Good morning! Ready when you are.
greet.day: Good afternoon! Nice to see you.
greet.evening: Good evening! You made it through the day.
greet.night: Up this late? I'll keep you company.
greet.yesterday: {n, plural, one {We finished # task yesterday!} other {We finished # tasks yesterday!}}
